display_name: TNAU — Rice nutrient management (transplanted puddled lowland)
licence: Government of India / state university — attribution required
notes: TNAU's blanket NPK schedule for transplanted rice. Rates given as N/P2O5/K2O (not urea/TSP/MOP), matching Indian agricultural convention. Useful cross-reference for Sri Lankan tank-fed systems but must be calibrated against DOA/RRDI's 2013 fertilizer booklet before driving farmer recommendations.
